```text
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the app. Let me compile the complete feature list.

## Comprehensive Feature List - Zenit Nighttime Companion App

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's a complete inventory of all implemented features in the Zenit app prototype:

---

### PAGES & NAVIGATION STRUCTURE (6 Main Routes)

1. **Home/Map Idle Page** (`/`)
   - Interactive dark map centered on user location
   - Real-time friend activity tracking
   - Friend request management system
   - Toggle friend visibility on map
   - Locate me button for geolocation
   - Floating action buttons for friends and location

2. **Search Page** (`/search`)
   - Dual-input location search (origin + destination)
   - Swap origin/destination functionality
   - Autocomplete suggestions with distance calculation
   - Integration with OpenStreetMap Nominatim API
   - Persistent location history via sessionStorage

3. **Route Selection Page** (`/routes`)
   - Dual route comparison (Ruta Zenit vs Ruta Estándar)
   - Real-time route calculation using OSRM API
   - Route cards showing distance, duration, safety percentage
   - Collapsible bottom sheet for route selection
   - Drag-to-collapse gesture support on mobile
   - Route characteristics display (lighting, safety, crowds)

4. **Route Details Page** (`/route-details`)
   - Route preview on interactive map
   - Share route with contacts modal
   - Viewers list showing who's tracking the route
   - Remove viewers functionality
   - Start navigation button

5. **Active Navigation Page** (`/navigation`)
   - Real-time user position tracking on map
   - Friend activity cards showing live friend positions
   - Direction instruction card with turn icons
   - Animated user arrow showing bearing
   - Friends activity panel with collapsible sheet
   - Friend activity focus view
   - Share route modal during navigation
   - Route cancellation with confirmation dialog
   - Shared contacts list with ability to remove viewers
   - Navigation end button

6. **Navigation Complete Page** (`/navigation-end`)
   - Success celebration screen with checkmark animation
   - Confirmation message
   - Return to home button

---

### CORE FEATURES & FUNCTIONALITY

#### Route Calculation & Smart Routing

- **Dual Route Algorithm** using OSRM (Open Source Routing Machine)
  - Ruta Zenit (Safe): Uses car profile, prioritizes main avenues/wide streets, straightest routes with fewer turns
  - Ruta Estándar (Fast): Uses foot profile, shortest walking distance
  
- **Route Differentiation Strategy**:
  - OSRM alternatives (up to 3 routes)
  - Small nudge waypoints (~200-300m offset) for variety
  - Backtracking/loop detection and filtering
  - Route distance validation (max 1.6x shortest)
  - Turn angle calculation (degrees per km) for safety assessment
  
- **Distance & Duration Calculation**:
  - Real walking speed simulation (1.4 m/s = ~5 km/h)
  - Duration adjustment for safety routes (slightly longer)
  - Haversine distance formula for coordinate calculations

#### Geolocation & Location Services

- **User Geolocation**:
  - Browser geolocation API integration with high accuracy
  - Persistent user location across pages
  - Manual location refresh via "locate me" button
  
- **Place Search** (Nominatim API):
  - Search within Barcelona area bounds
  - Distance calculation from user to search results
  - Debounced search input (300ms)
  - Spanish language support

#### Map Interface

- **Interactive Map** (Leaflet-based):
  - Dark CartoDB tiles with custom styling
  - Origin marker (yellow circle with glow)
  - Destination marker (yellow with inner dot)
  - Route visualization (yellow for Zenit, purple for Standard)
  - Route selection highlighting (solid vs dashed)
  - Fit-to-bounds functionality for route overview
  - Friend routes displayed as purple dashed lines
  - Friend location markers with names
  - User navigation arrow showing bearing direction
  - Bounds focusing on friend routes
  - Custom tile filter (sepia, hue-rotate, saturation, brightness)

#### Friend & Social Features

- **Friend Request System**:
  - Incoming friend request modal
  - Queue-based request handling (2.5s delay between requests)
  - Accept/Reject functionality
  - Pending requests list management
  - Session-based storage of friend states

- **Friend Tracking**:
  - Live friend activity cards showing:
    - Friend name and current location
    - Activity status (e.g., "está caminando")
    - Destination and address
    - Last update time
    - Departure and estimated arrival times
    - Travel progress percentage
  - Toggle friend visibility on map
  - Stop tracking confirmation dialog
  - Hidden friends remain in state but invisible on map

- **Route Sharing**:
  - Share route with multiple contacts
  - Contact search/filter in share modal
  - Multi-select contact picker
  - View count badge showing active viewers
  - Viewers list modal with ability to remove individual viewers
  - Confirmation dialog before removing viewers
  - Real-time viewer list during navigation

- **Friend Data**:
  - Sample hardcoded friends (Juan, Marta) with:
    - Real routes fetched from OSRM
    - Animated position progress
    - Fallback routes if API fails
    - Custom origin/destination coordinates

#### Real-time Simulation Features

- **User Movement Simulation** (during navigation):
  - Automatic user position advancement along route every 3 seconds
  - Route index progression
  - Continuous navigation experience

- **Friend Movement Simulation**:
  - Automatic friend position advancement every 2 seconds
  - Route progression along fetched routes
  - Position updates on map

#### Data Persistence

- **SessionStorage Management**:
  - Selected route storage (`zenit_selected_route`)
  - Origin/destination storage (`zenit_origin`, `zenit_destination`)
  - Accepted friends list (`zenit_accepted_friends`)
  - Pending requests (`zenit_pending_requests`)
  - Hidden friends (`zenit_hidden_friends`)
  - Shared contacts during navigation (`zenit_shared_contacts`)
  - Selected route type (`zenit_selected_route_type`)

#### Navigation UI Components

- **Direction Cards**: Shows turn direction (left/right/straight) with distance and instruction
- **Route Cards**: Displays route type, distance, duration, safety percentage, and characteristics
- **Friend Activity Cards**: Shows friend status, activity, destination, departure/arrival times
- **Search Suggestions**: Place search results with icons, addresses, and distances
- **Pending Requests List**: Compact list of pending friend location requests
- **Share Route Modal**: Contact selection modal with search filter and multi-select
- **Friend Request Modal**: Full-screen modal for incoming location sharing requests
- **Location Input**: Dual-field location picker with swap functionality
- **Bottom Sheets**: Collapsible panels with drag-to-collapse gesture support

#### Theme & Styling

- **Dark Theme**:
  - Deep purple background (#1F193D)
  - Light text on dark surfaces
  - Color scheme: purples, yellows, and muted tones
  
- **Color Palette**:
  - Primary: Purple (265° 90% 60%)
  - Accent: Yellow/Gold (45° 100% 50%)
  - Secondary: Dark purple variants
  - Destructive: Red for warning/delete actions
  - All colors defined in centralized theme config

- **Typography**:
  - Inter font family across app
  - Semantic hierarchy with font weights

#### UI/UX Elements

- **FABs** (Floating Action Buttons):
  - Friends toggle button with notification badge
  - Locate me button
  - Navigation mode toggle (fit-all vs focus)
  
- **Buttons**:
  - Primary: Full-width actions (continue, start navigation)
  - Secondary: Alternative actions (cancel, back)
  - Icon buttons: Compact action triggers
  - Confirmation buttons for destructive actions

- **Modals & Dialogs**:
  - Full-screen friend request modal
  - Bottom-sheet share route modal with animation
  - Inline confirmation dialogs
  - Overlay modals for route cancellation
  - Viewers list popovers

- **Responsive Design**:
  - Mobile-first approach
  - Max-width constrained to mobile (max-w-md)
  - Bottom sheets adapt to content height
  - Touch-optimized interaction areas

- **Animations**:
  - Fade-in/zoom-in transitions for modals
  - Slide-up animation for bottom sheets
  - Smooth drag gestures on mobile
  - Scale transforms on button clicks
  - Transition effects on color/state changes

---

### TECHNICAL INTEGRATIONS

1. **External APIs**:
   - OpenStreetMap Nominatim (place search)
   - OSRM - Open Source Routing Machine (routing)
   - CartoDB (dark map tiles)

2. **Libraries & Frameworks**:
   - React 18 with TypeScript
   - React Router v6 (navigation)
   - Leaflet (mapping)
   - React Hook Form (forms)
   - TanStack React Query (data fetching)
   - Tailwind CSS (styling)
   - Lucide React (icons)
   - Radix UI (accessible components)
   - Zod (schema validation)
   - Recharts (charting, though not actively used in visible features)

3. **Browser APIs**:
   - Geolocation API (GPS positioning)
   - SessionStorage (data persistence)
   - Touch Events (gesture handling)

---

### CONFIGURATION & CONSTANTS

- **Contacts Configuration**: Hardcoded contact list (Juan, María, Carla, Javier)
- **Theme Configuration**: All colors, fonts, gradients, shadows defined in `theme.ts`
- **Barcelona Bounds**: Search restricted to Barcelona area (viewbox: 2.0524,41.4620,2.2280,41.3200)
- **Default Locations**: Fallback coordinates for Barcelona city center

---

### INCOMPLETE/NOT FULLY IMPLEMENTED

- Authentication/Login system (not visible in routes)
- User profile management (beyond friend sharing)
- Settings page
- Notification system (modals only, no push notifications)
- Supabase integration (imported but not utilized)
- Data charts/analytics (Recharts installed but unused)
- Actual backend persistence (all data in sessionStorage only)

---

This is a fully-featured prototype focusing on route safety, friend tracking, and real-time navigation sharing for nighttime travel in Barcelona.
```

```text
     3→import { TooltipProvider } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";

     5→import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from "react-router-dom";
     6→import MapIdle from "./pages/MapIdle";
     7→import MapSearch from "./pages/MapSearch";
     8→import MapRoutes from "./pages/MapRoutes";
     9→import MapRouteDetails from "./pages/MapRouteDetails";

    12→import NotFound from "./pages/NotFound";
```

```text
     1→import { FC, useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { Users } from 'lucide-react';
     4→import { ZenitMap } from '@/components/ZenitMap';
     5→import { SearchBar } from '@/components/SearchBar';
     6→import { FriendActivityCard } from '@/components/FriendActivityCard';
     7→import { FriendRequestModal } from '@/components/FriendRequestModal';
     8→import { PendingRequestsList } from '@/components/PendingRequestsList';
     9→
    10→const formatTime = (date: Date) =>
    11→  date.toLocaleTimeString('es-ES', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
    12→
    13→const FRIEND_ROUTES = [
    14→  {
    15→    id: 'juan',
    16→    name: 'Juan',
    17→    origin: [41.3950, 2.1650] as [number, number],
    18→    dest: [41.4080, 2.1820] as [number, number],
    19→    fallback: [
    20→      [41.3950, 2.1650], [41.3970, 2.1680], [41.4000, 2.1720],
    21→      [41.4030, 2.1760], [41.4060, 2.1800], [41.4080, 2.1820],
    22→    ] as [number, number][],
    23→    activity: 'está caminando',
    24→    destination: 'Casa',
    25→    address: 'Eixample',
    26→    minutesAgo: 5,
    27→    totalDurationMin: 20,
    28→    progress: 0.4,
    29→  },
    30→  {
    31→    id: 'marta',
    32→    name: 'Marta',
    33→    origin: [41.3890, 2.1590] as [number, number],
    34→    dest: [41.3980, 2.1780] as [number, number],
    35→    fallback: [
    36→      [41.3890, 2.1590], [41.3910, 2.1630], [41.3940, 2.1700],
    37→      [41.3960, 2.1740], [41.3980, 2.1780],
    38→    ] as [number, number][],
    39→    activity: 'está caminando',
    40→    destination: 'Trabajo',
    41→    address: 'Gràcia',
    42→    minutesAgo: 2,
    43→    totalDurationMin: 15,
    44→    progress: 0.6,
    45→  },
    46→];
    47→
    48→const MapIdle: FC = () => {
    49→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    50→  const [userLocation, setUserLocation] = useState<[number, number]>([41.4036, 2.1744]);
    51→  const [friendData, setFriendData] = useState<
    52→    { name: string; coordinates: [number, number][]; position: [number, number]; durationSec?: number }[]
    53→  >([]);
    54→  const [showFriends, setShowFriends] = useState(false);
    55→  const [focusBounds, setFocusBounds] = useState<[number, number][] | undefined>(undefined);
    56→
    57→  // Friend request system
    58→  const [notificationQueue, setNotificationQueue] = useState<{ id: string; name: string }[]>([]);
    59→  const [currentRequest, setCurrentRequest] = useState<{ id: string; name: string } | null>(null);
    60→  const [pendingRequests, setPendingRequests] = useState<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(() => {
    61→    try {
    62→      return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('zenit_pending_requests') || '[]');
    63→    } catch { return []; }
    64→  });
    65→  const [acceptedFriends, setAcceptedFriends] = useState<string[]>(() => {
    66→    try {
    67→      return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('zenit_accepted_friends') || '[]');
    68→    } catch { return []; }
    69→  });
    70→  const [hiddenFriends, setHiddenFriends] = useState<string[]>(() => {
    71→    try {
    72→      return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('zenit_hidden_friends') || '[]');
    73→    } catch { return []; }
    74→  });
    75→  const queueTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
    76→
    77→  // Show next request from queue with delay
    78→  const showNextFromQueue = useCallback((queue: { id: string; name: string }[]) => {
    79→    if (queue.length === 0) {
    80→      setCurrentRequest(null);
    81→      return;
    82→    }
    83→    queueTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
    84→      setCurrentRequest(queue[0]);
    85→      setNotificationQueue(queue.slice(1));
    86→    }, 2500);
    87→  }, []);
    88→
    89→  // Simulate incoming friend requests after a delay
    90→  useEffect(() => {
    91→    const alreadyHandled = [...acceptedFriends, ...pendingRequests.map(r => r.id)];
    92→    const incoming = FRIEND_ROUTES
    93→      .filter(fr => !alreadyHandled.includes(fr.id))
    94→      .map(fr => ({ id: fr.id, name: fr.name }));
    95→
    96→    if (incoming.length > 0) {
    97→      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    98→        setCurrentRequest(incoming[0]);
    99→        setNotificationQueue(incoming.slice(1));
   100→      }, 2000);
   101→      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
   102→    }
   103→  }, []);
   104→
   105→  // Cleanup timer
   106→  useEffect(() => {
   107→    return () => { if (queueTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(queueTimerRef.current); };
   108→  }, []);
   109→
   110→  const handleAcceptRequest = useCallback((id: string) => {
   111→    setAcceptedFriends(prev => {
   112→      const next = [...prev, id];
   113→      sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_accepted_friends', JSON.stringify(next));
   114→      return next;
   115→    });
   116→    // Remove from pending if it was there
   117→    setPendingRequests(prev => {
   118→      const next = prev.filter(r => r.id !== id);
   119→      sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_pending_requests', JSON.stringify(next));
   120→      return next;
   121→    });
   122→    setCurrentRequest(null);
   123→    showNextFromQueue(notificationQueue);
   124→  }, [notificationQueue, showNextFromQueue]);
   125→
   126→  const handleRejectRequest = useCallback((id: string) => {
   127→    const request = currentRequest || pendingRequests.find(r => r.id === id);
   128→    if (request) {
   129→      // Move to pending (dismissed) state
   130→      setPendingRequests(prev => {
   131→        if (prev.some(r => r.id === id)) return prev;
   132→        const next = [...prev, { id: request.id, name: request.name }];
   133→        sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_pending_requests', JSON.stringify(next));
   134→        return next;
   135→      });
   136→    }
   137→    setCurrentRequest(null);
   138→    showNextFromQueue(notificationQueue);
   139→  }, [currentRequest, notificationQueue, pendingRequests, showNextFromQueue]);
   140→
   141→  const handlePendingReject = useCallback((id: string) => {
   142→    setPendingRequests(prev => {
   143→      const next = prev.filter(r => r.id !== id);
   144→      sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_pending_requests', JSON.stringify(next));
   145→      return next;
   146→    });
   147→  }, []);
   148→
   149→  useEffect(() => {
   150→    if ('geolocation' in navigator) {
   151→      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
   152→        (position) => {
   153→          setUserLocation([position.coords.latitude, position.coords.longitude]);
   154→        },
   155→        (error) => {
   156→          console.log('Geolocation error:', error.message);
   157→        },
   158→        { enableHighAccuracy: true }
   159→      );
   160→    }
   161→  }, []);
   162→
   163→  // Fetch friend routes from OSRM
   164→  useEffect(() => {
   165→    Promise.all(
   166→      FRIEND_ROUTES.map(async (fr) => {
   167→        try {
   168→          const coords = `${fr.origin[1]},${fr.origin[0]};${fr.dest[1]},${fr.dest[0]}`;
   169→          const res = await fetch(
   170→            `https://router.project-osrm.org/route/v1/foot/${coords}?overview=full&geometries=geojson`
   171→          );
   172→          const data = await res.json();
   173→          if (data?.code === 'Ok' && data.routes?.length) {
   174→            const pts: [number, number][] = data.routes[0].geometry.coordinates.map(
   175→              ([lng, lat]: [number, number]) => [lat, lng] as [number, number]
   176→            );
   177→            const idx = Math.floor(pts.length * fr.progress);
   178→            return { name: fr.name, coordinates: pts, position: pts[idx], durationSec: data.routes[0].duration };
   179→          }
   180→        } catch { /* fallback */ }
   181→        const idx = Math.floor(fr.fallback.length * fr.progress);
   182→        return { name: fr.name, coordinates: fr.fallback, position: fr.fallback[idx], durationSec: fr.totalDurationMin * 60 };
   183→      })
   184→    ).then(setFriendData);
   185→  }, []);
   186→
   187→  // Only show accepted friends
   188→  const toggleFriendVisibility = useCallback((id: string) => {
   189→    setHiddenFriends(prev => {
   190→      const next = prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(x => x !== id) : [...prev, id];
   191→      sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_hidden_friends', JSON.stringify(next));
   192→      return next;
   193→    });
   194→  }, []);
   195→
   196→  const acceptedFriendRoutes = friendData
   197→    .filter(fd => {
   198→      const fr = FRIEND_ROUTES.find(r => r.name === fd.name);
   199→      return fr && acceptedFriends.includes(fr.id) && !hiddenFriends.includes(fr.id);
   200→    })
   201→    .map(({ name, coordinates, position }) => ({ name, coordinates, position }));
   202→
   203→  const badgeCount = acceptedFriends.length + pendingRequests.length;
   204→
   205→  // Compute real departure/arrival times
   206→  const friendTimes = useMemo(() => {
   207→    const now = new Date();
   208→    return FRIEND_ROUTES.map((fr) => {
   209→      const match = friendData.find((d) => d.name === fr.name);
   210→      const departureDate = new Date(now.getTime() - fr.minutesAgo * 60_000);
   211→      const totalSec = match?.durationSec ?? fr.totalDurationMin * 60;
   212→      const arrivalDate = new Date(departureDate.getTime() + totalSec * 1000);
   213→      return {
   214→        name: fr.name,
   215→        time: `Hace ${fr.minutesAgo} min`,
   216→        departureTime: formatTime(departureDate),
   217→        estimatedArrival: formatTime(arrivalDate),
   218→      };
   219→    });
   220→  }, [friendData]);
   221→
   222→  // Only show accepted friends in cards
   223→  const acceptedFriendData = FRIEND_ROUTES.filter(fr => acceptedFriends.includes(fr.id));
   224→
   225→  return (
   226→    <div className="relative h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
   227→      <ZenitMap
   228→        center={userLocation}
   229→        zoom={15}
   230→        origin={userLocation}
   231→        friendRoutes={showFriends ? acceptedFriendRoutes : []}
   232→        focusBounds={focusBounds}
   233→        className="absolute inset-0"
   234→      />
   235→
   236→      {/* Search bar */}
   237→      <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 pt-12 z-[1000]">
   238→        <SearchBar
   239→          placeholder="Buscar"
   240→          onClick={() => navigate('/search')}
   241→          readOnly
   242→        />
   243→      </div>
   244→
   245→      {/* Friends FAB with badge */}
   246→      <div className="absolute bottom-6 left-4 z-[1000]">
   247→        <button
   248→          onClick={() => setShowFriends((p) => !p)}
   249→          className={`relative w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transition-colors ${
   250→            showFriends
   251→              ? 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground'
   252→              : 'bg-card/90 text-muted-foreground border border-border'
   253→          }`}
   254→        >
   255→          <Users className="w-5 h-5" />
   256→          {badgeCount > 0 && (
   257→            <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-accent text-accent-foreground text-[10px] font-bold flex items-center justify-center shadow-md">
   258→              {badgeCount}
   259→            </span>
   260→          )}
   261→        </button>
   262→      </div>
   263→
   264→      {/* Locate me FAB */}
   265→      <div className="absolute bottom-6 right-4 z-[1000]">
   266→        <button
   267→          onClick={() => {
   268→            setFocusBounds(undefined);
   269→            if ('geolocation' in navigator) {
   270→              navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition((position) => {
   271→                setUserLocation([position.coords.latitude, position.coords.longitude]);
   272→              });
   273→            }
   274→          }}
   275→          className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-primary/80 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg"
   276→        >
   277→          <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-white" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
   278→            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3" />
   279→            <path d="M12 2v4M12 18v4M2 12h4M18 12h4" />
   280→          </svg>
   281→        </button>
   282→      </div>
   283→
   284→      {/* Friends activity cards */}
   285→      {showFriends && (acceptedFriendRoutes.length > 0 || pendingRequests.length > 0) && (
   286→        <div className="absolute bottom-20 left-4 right-4 z-[1000] space-y-2 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto pb-2">
   287→          {/* Pending requests */}
   288→          <PendingRequestsList
   289→            requests={pendingRequests}
   290→            onAccept={handleAcceptRequest}
   291→            onReject={handlePendingReject}
   292→          />
   293→
   294→          {/* Active friends */}
   295→          {acceptedFriendRoutes.length > 0 && (
   296→            <>
   297→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider px-1">
   298→                Amigos activos
   299→              </p>
   300→              {acceptedFriendData.map((fr) => {
   301→                const match = acceptedFriendRoutes.find((r) => r.name === fr.name);
   302→                const times = friendTimes.find((t) => t.name === fr.name);
   303→                return (
   304→                  <FriendActivityCard
   305→                    key={fr.name}
   306→                    name={fr.name}
   307→                    activity={fr.activity}
   308→                    destination={fr.destination}
   309→                    address={fr.address}
   310→                    time={times?.time ?? `Hace ${fr.minutesAgo} min`}
   311→                    departureTime={times?.departureTime}
   312→                    estimatedArrival={times?.estimatedArrival}
   313→                    tracking={!hiddenFriends.includes(fr.id)}
   314→                    onToggleTracking={() => toggleFriendVisibility(fr.id)}
   315→                    onClick={() => {
   316→                      if (match) {
   317→                        setFocusBounds(match.coordinates);
   318→                      }
   319→                    }}
   320→                  />
   321→                );
   322→              })}
   323→            </>
   324→          )}
   325→        </div>
   326→      )}
   327→
   328→      {/* Friend request modal */}
   329→      <FriendRequestModal
   330→        request={currentRequest}
   331→        onAccept={handleAcceptRequest}
   332→        onReject={handleRejectRequest}
   333→      />
   334→    </div>
   335→  );
   336→};
   337→
   338→export default MapIdle;
   339→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { FC, useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { ChevronLeft } from 'lucide-react';
     4→import { LocationInput } from '@/components/LocationInput';
     5→import { SearchSuggestion } from '@/components/SearchSuggestion';
     6→import { searchPlaces, storeDestination, storeOrigin, clearOrigin, GeocodingResult } from '@/lib/geocoding';
     7→
     8→type ActiveField = 'origin' | 'destination';
     9→
    10→const MapSearch: FC = () => {
    11→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    12→  const [origin, setOrigin] = useState('Tu ubicación');
    13→  const [destination, setDestination] = useState('');
    14→  const [activeField, setActiveField] = useState<ActiveField>('destination');
    15→  const [results, setResults] = useState<GeocodingResult[]>([]);
    16→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    17→  const [userLocation, setUserLocation] = useState<{ lat: number; lon: number } | null>(null);
    18→  const [customOrigin, setCustomOrigin] = useState<GeocodingResult | null>(null);
    19→
    20→  // Get user location for distance calc
    21→  useEffect(() => {
    22→    if ('geolocation' in navigator) {
    23→      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition((pos) => {
    24→        setUserLocation({ lat: pos.coords.latitude, lon: pos.coords.longitude });
    25→      });
    26→    }
    27→  }, []);
    28→
    29→  const activeQuery = activeField === 'origin' ? origin : destination;
    30→
    31→  // Debounced search
    32→  useEffect(() => {
    33→    // Don't search if origin field shows default text
    34→    if (activeField === 'origin' && origin === 'Tu ubicación') {
    35→      setResults([]);
    36→      return;
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    if (!activeQuery || activeQuery.length < 2) {
    40→      setResults([]);
    41→      return;
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    setLoading(true);
    45→    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    46→      searchPlaces(activeQuery, userLocation?.lat, userLocation?.lon).then((res) => {
    47→        setResults(res);
    48→        setLoading(false);
    49→      });
    50→    }, 300);
    51→
    52→    return () => clearTimeout(timeout);
    53→  }, [activeQuery, userLocation, activeField, origin]);
    54→
    55→  const handleSelectResult = useCallback((result: GeocodingResult) => {
    56→    if (activeField === 'origin') {
    57→      setOrigin(result.name);
    58→      setCustomOrigin(result);
    59→      storeOrigin({ name: result.name, lat: result.lat, lon: result.lon });
    60→      setResults([]);
    61→      setActiveField('destination');
    62→    } else {
    63→      storeDestination({ name: result.name, lat: result.lat, lon: result.lon });
    64→      setDestination(result.name);
    65→      navigate('/routes');
    66→    }
    67→  }, [navigate, activeField]);
    68→
    69→  const handleOriginChange = (value: string) => {
    70→    setOrigin(value);
    71→    setActiveField('origin');
    72→    if (value === '' || value.length < 2) {
    73→      setCustomOrigin(null);
    74→      clearOrigin();
    75→    }
    76→  };
    77→
    78→  const handleDestinationChange = (value: string) => {
    79→    setDestination(value);
    80→    setActiveField('destination');
    81→  };
    82→
    83→  const handleSwap = () => {
    84→    const tempOrigin = origin;
    85→    const tempCustomOrigin = customOrigin;
    86→    setOrigin(destination);
    87→    setDestination(tempOrigin);
    88→    // Swap stored data too
    89→    if (tempCustomOrigin) {
    90→      storeDestination({ name: tempCustomOrigin.name, lat: tempCustomOrigin.lat, lon: tempCustomOrigin.lon });
    91→    }
    92→    setCustomOrigin(null);
    93→    clearOrigin();
    94→  };
    95→
    96→  return (
    97→    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background">
    98→      {/* Header with back and location input */}
    99→      <div className="p-4 pt-12">
   100→        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   101→          <button 
   102→            onClick={() => navigate('/')}
   103→            className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary/80 flex items-center justify-center mt-2"
   104→          >
   105→            <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
   106→          </button>
   107→          <div className="flex-1">
   108→            <LocationInput
   109→              origin={origin}
   110→              destination={destination}
   111→              onOriginChange={handleOriginChange}
   112→              onDestinationChange={handleDestinationChange}
   113→              onSwap={handleSwap}
   114→              activeField={activeField}
   115→              onFieldFocus={setActiveField}
   116→            />
   117→          </div>
   118→        </div>
   119→      </div>
   120→
   121→      {/* Results list */}
   122→      <div className="px-4 pt-4">
   123→        {activeField === 'origin' && origin === 'Tu ubicación' && (
   124→          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3">Escribe para buscar un origen personalizado</p>
   125→        )}
   126→        {loading && (
   127→          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3">Buscando…</p>
   128→        )}
   129→        {!loading && results.length === 0 && activeQuery.length >= 2 && !(activeField === 'origin' && origin === 'Tu ubicación') && (
   130→          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3">No se encontraron resultados</p>
   131→        )}
   132→        {!loading && results.length === 0 && activeQuery.length < 2 && activeField === 'destination' && (
   133→          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mb-3">Escribe para buscar lugares</p>
   134→        )}
   135→        <div className="space-y-1">
   136→          {results.map(result => (
   137→            <SearchSuggestion
   138→              key={result.id}
   139→              name={result.name}
   140→              address={result.address}
   141→              distance={result.distance || ''}
   142→              onClick={() => handleSelectResult(result)}
   143→            />
   144→          ))}
   145→        </div>
   146→      </div>
   147→    </div>
   148→  );
   149→};
   150→
   151→export default MapSearch;
   152→
```

```text
     1→import { FC, useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
     3→import { ZenitMap } from '@/components/ZenitMap';
     4→import { RouteCard } from '@/components/RouteCard';
     5→import { BackButton } from '@/components/BackButton';
     6→import { fetchSafeAndFastRoutes, storeSelectedRoute, RouteResult } from '@/lib/routing';
     7→import { getStoredDestination, getStoredOrigin } from '@/lib/geocoding';
     8→
     9→const MapRoutes: FC = () => {
    10→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    11→  const [selectedRoute, setSelectedRoute] = useState<'safe' | 'fast'>('safe');
    12→  const [userLocation, setUserLocation] = useState<[number, number]>([41.4036, 2.1744]);
    13→  const [safeRoute, setSafeRoute] = useState<RouteResult | null>(null);
    14→  const [fastRoute, setFastRoute] = useState<RouteResult | null>(null);
    15→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    16→
    17→  // Bottom sheet drag state
    18→  const [sheetCollapsed, setSheetCollapsed] = useState(false);
    19→  const [dragOffset, setDragOffset] = useState(0);
    20→  const isDragging = useRef(false);
    21→  const startY = useRef(0);
    22→  const sheetRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    23→
    24→  const handleTouchStart = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    25→    isDragging.current = true;
    26→    startY.current = e.touches[0].clientY;
    27→    setDragOffset(0);
    28→  }, []);
    29→
    30→  const handleTouchMove = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    31→    if (!isDragging.current) return;
    32→    const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - startY.current;
    33→    // Only allow dragging down when expanded, or up when collapsed
    34→    if (!sheetCollapsed && dy > 0) {
    35→      setDragOffset(dy);
    36→    } else if (sheetCollapsed && dy < 0) {
    37→      setDragOffset(dy);
    38→    }
    39→  }, [sheetCollapsed]);
    40→
    41→  const handleTouchEnd = useCallback(() => {
    42→    isDragging.current = false;
    43→    const threshold = 60;
    44→    if (!sheetCollapsed && dragOffset > threshold) {
    45→      setSheetCollapsed(true);
    46→    } else if (sheetCollapsed && dragOffset < -threshold) {
    47→      setSheetCollapsed(false);
    48→    }
    49→    setDragOffset(0);
    50→  }, [sheetCollapsed, dragOffset]);
    51→
    52→  // Get destination from search selection or fallback
    53→  const storedDest = getStoredDestination();
    54→  const destination: [number, number] = storedDest
    55→    ? [storedDest.lat, storedDest.lon]
    56→    : [41.4110, 2.1850];
    57→
    58→  // Get custom origin or use geolocation
    59→  const storedOrigin = getStoredOrigin();
    60→
    61→  useEffect(() => {
    62→    if (storedOrigin) {
    63→      setUserLocation([storedOrigin.lat, storedOrigin.lon]);
    64→    } else if ('geolocation' in navigator) {
    65→      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    66→        (position) => {
    67→          setUserLocation([position.coords.latitude, position.coords.longitude]);
    68→        }
    69→      );
    70→    }
    71→  }, []);
    72→
    73→  // Fetch real routes when origin changes
    74→  useEffect(() => {
    75→    let cancelled = false;
    76→    setLoading(true);
    77→
    78→    fetchSafeAndFastRoutes(userLocation, destination).then(({ safe, fast }) => {
    79→      if (cancelled) return;
    80→      setSafeRoute(safe);
    81→      setFastRoute(fast);
    82→      setLoading(false);
    83→    });
    84→
    85→    return () => { cancelled = true; };
    86→  }, [userLocation[0], userLocation[1], destination[0], destination[1]]);
    87→
    88→  const currentRouteData = selectedRoute === 'safe' ? (safeRoute || fastRoute) : (fastRoute || safeRoute);
    89→  const alternativeRouteData = selectedRoute === 'safe' ? (fastRoute || safeRoute) : (safeRoute || fastRoute);
    90→
    91→  const formatDistance = (m: number) => `${(m / 1000).toFixed(1)} km`;
    92→  const formatDuration = (s: number) => {
    93→    const mins = Math.round(s / 60);
    94→    if (mins >= 60) {
    95→      const h = Math.floor(mins / 60);
    96→      const m = mins % 60;
    97→      return m > 0 ? `${h} h ${m} min` : `${h} h`;
    98→    }
    99→    return `${mins} min`;
   100→  };
   101→
   102→  const handleContinue = () => {
   103→    if (currentRouteData) {
   104→      storeSelectedRoute(currentRouteData);
   105→    }
   106→    sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_selected_route_type', selectedRoute);
   107→    navigate('/route-details');
   108→  };
   109→
   110→  // Compute map center from route bounds
   111→  const mapCenter: [number, number] = safeRoute?.coordinates?.length
   112→    ? [
   113→        (userLocation[0] + destination[0]) / 2,
   114→        (userLocation[1] + destination[1]) / 2,
   115→      ]
   116→    : [41.4070, 2.1790];
   117→
   118→  return (
   119→    <div className="relative h-screen w-full overflow-hidden">
   120→      <ZenitMap
   121→        center={mapCenter}
   122→        zoom={14}
   123→        origin={userLocation}
   124→        destination={destination}
   125→        route={safeRoute?.coordinates}
   126→        alternativeRoute={fastRoute?.coordinates}
   127→        selectedRoute={selectedRoute}
   128→        fitToRoute
   129→        className="absolute inset-0"
   130→      />
   131→
   132→      {/* Back button */}
   133→      <div className="absolute top-12 left-4 z-[1000]">
   134→        <BackButton onClick={() => navigate('/search')} />
   135→      </div>
   136→
   137→      {/* Bottom sheet */}
   138→      <div
   139→        ref={sheetRef}
   140→        onTouchStart={handleTouchStart}
   141→        onTouchMove={handleTouchMove}
   142→        onTouchEnd={handleTouchEnd}
   143→        className="zenit-bottom-sheet p-6 pb-8 z-[1000]"
   144→        style={{
   145→          transform: sheetCollapsed
   146→            ? `translateY(calc(100% - 48px + ${Math.min(dragOffset, 0)}px))`
   147→            : `translateY(${Math.max(dragOffset, 0)}px)`,
   148→          transition: isDragging.current ? 'none' : 'transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)',
   149→        }}
   150→      >
   151→        <div
   152→          className="zenit-sheet-handle mb-4 cursor-grab"
   153→          onClick={() => setSheetCollapsed((c) => !c)}
   154→        />
   155→        
   156→        <h3 className="text-foreground font-semibold mb-4">Elige tu ruta</h3>
   157→        
   158→        {loading ? (
   159→          <p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">Calculando rutas reales…</p>
   160→        ) : (
   161→          <div className="space-y-3">
   162→            <RouteCard
   163→              type="safe"
   164→              distance={safeRoute ? formatDistance(safeRoute.distance) : '—'}
   165→              duration={safeRoute ? formatDuration(safeRoute.duration) : '—'}
   166→              safetyPercentage={95}
   167→              tags={['Calles bien iluminadas', 'Áreas activas', 'Calles amplias']}
   168→              selected={selectedRoute === 'safe'}
   169→              onClick={() => setSelectedRoute('safe')}
   170→            />
   171→            {fastRoute && (
   172→              <RouteCard
   173→                type="fast"
   174→                distance={formatDistance(fastRoute.distance)}
   175→                duration={formatDuration(fastRoute.duration)}
   176→                safetyPercentage={73}
   177→                tags={['Menor distancia', 'Menos iluminada', 'Menos peatones']}
   178→                selected={selectedRoute === 'fast'}
   179→                onClick={() => setSelectedRoute('fast')}
   180→              />
   181→            )}
   182→          </div>
   183→        )}
   184→        
   185→        <button 
   186→          onClick={handleContinue}
   187→          className={loading ? 'zenit-btn-primary mt-4 opacity-50 bg-muted text-muted-foreground cursor-not-allowed' : 'zenit-btn-primary mt-4'}
   188→          disabled={loading}
   189→        >
   190→          {loading ? 'Cargando…' : 'Continuar'}
   191→        </button>
   192→      </div>
   193→    </div>
   194→  );
   195→};
   196→
   197→export default MapRoutes;
   198→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   117→        </button>
   118→      </div>
   119→
   120→      <ShareRouteModal
   121→        isOpen={showShareModal}
   122→        onClose={() => setShowShareModal(false)}
   123→        onShare={(selected) => {
   124→          setSharedContacts(selected);
   125→          setShowShareModal(false);
   126→        }}
   127→        contacts={contacts}
   128→      />
   129→    </div>
   130→  );
   131→};
   132→
   133→export default MapRouteDetails;
   134→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→// Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) geocoding API - free, no API key required
     2→const NOMINATIM_URL = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org';
     3→
     4→export interface GeocodingResult {
     5→  id: string;
     6→  name: string;
     7→  address: string;
     8→  lat: number;
     9→  lon: number;
    10→  distance?: string;
    11→}
    12→
    13→/**
    14→ * Search for places using Nominatim
    15→ * @param query Search text
    16→ * @param userLat User latitude for distance calculation (optional)
    17→ * @param userLon User longitude for distance calculation (optional)
    18→ */
    19→export async function searchPlaces(
    20→  query: string,
    21→  userLat?: number,
    22→  userLon?: number
    23→): Promise<GeocodingResult[]> {
    24→  if (!query || query.length < 2) return [];
    25→
    26→  try {
    27→    const params = new URLSearchParams({
    28→      q: query,
    29→      format: 'json',
    30→      addressdetails: '1',
    31→      limit: '8',
    32→      viewbox: '2.0524,41.4620,2.2280,41.3200',
    33→      bounded: '1',
    34→    });
    35→
    36→    const res = await fetch(`${NOMINATIM_URL}/search?${params}`, {
    37→      headers: {
    38→        'Accept-Language': 'es',
    39→      },
    40→    });
    41→
    42→    if (!res.ok) return [];
    43→
    44→    const data = await res.json();
    45→
    46→    return data.map((item: any) => {
    47→      const lat = parseFloat(item.lat);
    48→      const lon = parseFloat(item.lon);
    49→
    50→      // Calculate distance if user position is available
    51→      let distance: string | undefined;
    52→      if (userLat !== undefined && userLon !== undefined) {
    53→        const d = haversineDistance(userLat, userLon, lat, lon);
    54→        distance = d < 1 ? `${Math.round(d * 1000)} m` : `${d.toFixed(1)} km`;
    55→      }
    56→
    57→      return {
    58→        id: item.place_id.toString(),
    59→        name: item.display_name.split(',')[0],
    60→        address: item.display_name,
    61→        lat,
    62→        lon,
    63→        distance,
    64→      };
    65→    });
    66→  } catch (err) {
    67→    console.error('Geocoding search failed:', err);
    68→    return [];
    69→  }
    70→}
    71→
    72→/** Calculate distance between two coordinates in km using Haversine formula */
    73→function haversineDistance(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {
    74→  const R = 6371; // Earth radius in km
    75→  const dLat = toRad(lat2 - lat1);
    76→  const dLon = toRad(lon2 - lon1);
    77→  const a =
    78→    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
    79→    Math.cos(toRad(lat1)) * Math.cos(toRad(lat2)) * Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);
    80→  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
    81→  return R * c;
    82→}
    83→
    84→function toRad(deg: number): number {
    85→  return deg * (Math.PI / 180);
    86→}
    87→
    88→/** Store selected destination in sessionStorage */
    89→export function storeDestination(dest: { name: string; lat: number; lon: number }) {
    90→  sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_destination', JSON.stringify(dest));
    91→}
    92→
    93→/** Retrieve selected destination from sessionStorage */
    94→export function getStoredDestination(): { name: string; lat: number; lon: number } | null {
    95→  const data = sessionStorage.getItem('zenit_destination');
    96→  return data ? JSON.parse(data) : null;
    97→}
    98→
    99→/** Store custom origin in sessionStorage */
   100→export function storeOrigin(origin: { name: string; lat: number; lon: number }) {
   101→  sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_origin', JSON.stringify(origin));
   102→}
   103→
   104→/** Clear custom origin (revert to geolocation) */
   105→export function clearOrigin() {
   106→  sessionStorage.removeItem('zenit_origin');
   107→}
   108→
   109→/** Retrieve custom origin from sessionStorage */
   110→export function getStoredOrigin(): { name: string; lat: number; lon: number } | null {
   111→  const data = sessionStorage.getItem('zenit_origin');
   112→  return data ? JSON.parse(data) : null;
   113→}
   114→
```

 `C:\Users\arthu\Documents\INTERCÂMBIO\1. BAU\TFM\zenit-your-nighttime-companion\src\lib\routing.ts`

```text
     1→// OSRM public API for real street routing
     2→const OSRM_BASE = 'https://router.project-osrm.org/route/v1';
     3→
     4→// Average walking speed in m/s (~5 km/h)
     5→const WALKING_SPEED = 1.4;
     6→
     7→export interface RouteResult {
     8→  coordinates: [number, number][];
     9→  distance: number; // meters
    10→  duration: number; // seconds
    11→}
    12→
    13→function parseOSRMRoute(route: any): RouteResult {
    14→  const distance = route.distance;
    15→  return {
    16→    coordinates: route.geometry.coordinates.map(
    17→      ([lng, lat]: [number, number]) => [lat, lng] as [number, number]
    18→    ),
    19→    distance,
    20→    duration: distance / WALKING_SPEED,
    21→  };
    22→}
    23→
    24→/**
    25→ * Calculate total cumulative angular change along a route (in degrees).
    26→ */
    27→function totalAngularChange(coords: [number, number][]): number {
    28→  if (coords.length < 3) return 0;
    29→  const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(coords.length / 50));
    30→  const sampled: [number, number][] = [];
    31→  for (let i = 0; i < coords.length; i += step) sampled.push(coords[i]);
    32→  if (sampled[sampled.length - 1] !== coords[coords.length - 1]) {
    33→    sampled.push(coords[coords.length - 1]);
    34→  }
    35→  let total = 0;
    36→  for (let i = 1; i < sampled.length - 1; i++) {
    37→    const [lat1, lon1] = sampled[i - 1];
    38→    const [lat2, lon2] = sampled[i];
    39→    const [lat3, lon3] = sampled[i + 1];
    40→    const b1 = Math.atan2(lon2 - lon1, lat2 - lat1);
    41→    const b2 = Math.atan2(lon3 - lon2, lat3 - lat2);
    42→    let diff = Math.abs(b2 - b1) * (180 / Math.PI);
    43→    if (diff > 180) diff = 360 - diff;
    44→    total += diff;
    45→  }
    46→  return total;
    47→}
    48→
    49→function turnsPerKm(route: RouteResult): number {
    50→  return totalAngularChange(route.coordinates) / (route.distance / 1000);
    51→}
    52→
    53→/**
    54→ * Detect if a route backtracks (has loops/doubled segments).
    55→ * Checks if the route visits nearly the same point twice.
    56→ */
    57→function hasBacktracking(coords: [number, number][]): boolean {
    58→  if (coords.length < 10) return false;
    59→  const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(coords.length / 30));
    60→  const sampled: [number, number][] = [];
    61→  for (let i = 0; i < coords.length; i += step) sampled.push(coords[i]);
    62→  
    63→  for (let i = 0; i < sampled.length; i++) {
    64→    for (let j = i + 3; j < sampled.length; j++) {
    65→      const dLat = Math.abs(sampled[i][0] - sampled[j][0]);
    66→      const dLon = Math.abs(sampled[i][1] - sampled[j][1]);
    67→      // ~15m threshold
    68→      if (dLat < 0.00015 && dLon < 0.00015) return true;
    69→    }
    70→  }
    71→  return false;
    72→}
    73→
    74→/**
    75→ * Small perpendicular waypoint to nudge route onto parallel streets.
    76→ * Only ONE waypoint at 40% of the way (not midpoint, to create asymmetric routes).
    77→ */
    78→function getNudgeWaypoint(
    79→  origin: [number, number],
    80→  destination: [number, number],
    81→  offsetDeg: number
    82→): [number, number] {
    83→  const dLat = destination[0] - origin[0];
    84→  const dLon = destination[1] - origin[1];
    85→  const len = Math.sqrt(dLat * dLat + dLon * dLon);
    86→  if (len === 0) return origin;
    87→  
    88→  // Point at 40% along the line
    89→  const t = 0.4;
    90→  const midLat = origin[0] + dLat * t;
    91→  const midLon = origin[1] + dLon * t;
    92→  
    93→  // Perpendicular
    94→  const perpLat = (-dLon / len) * offsetDeg;
    95→  const perpLon = (dLat / len) * offsetDeg;
    96→  
    97→  return [midLat + perpLat, midLon + perpLon];
    98→}
    99→
   100→/**
   101→ * Fetch two visually different walking routes:
   102→ * - Standard (fast): shortest/most direct → callejuelas, atajos
   103→ * - Zenit (safe): straighter, fewer turns → vías principales
   104→ * 
   105→ * Strategy:
   106→ * 1. OSRM alternatives (up to 3)
   107→ * 2. Two small nudge waypoints (~80m offset) for variety
   108→ * 3. Filter out routes with backtracking/loops
   109→ * 4. Filter out routes > 1.6x shortest
   110→ * 5. Standard = shortest, Zenit = straightest (fewest °/km) that differs
   111→ */
   112→export async function fetchSafeAndFastRoutes(
   113→  origin: [number, number],
   114→  destination: [number, number]
   115→): Promise<{ safe: RouteResult | null; fast: RouteResult | null }> {
   116→  const directCoords = `${origin[1]},${origin[0]};${destination[1]},${destination[0]}`;
   117→
   118→  // Larger nudges (~200-300m each direction) to force genuinely different streets
   119→  const dist = Math.sqrt(
   120→    Math.pow(destination[0] - origin[0], 2) + Math.pow(destination[1] - origin[1], 2)
   121→  );
   122→  const nudge = Math.max(0.002, dist * 0.15); // At least ~200m, scales with distance
   123→  const wp1 = getNudgeWaypoint(origin, destination, nudge);
   124→  const wp2 = getNudgeWaypoint(origin, destination, -nudge);
   125→  const wpCoords1 = `${origin[1]},${origin[0]};${wp1[1]},${wp1[0]};${destination[1]},${destination[0]}`;
   126→  const wpCoords2 = `${origin[1]},${origin[0]};${wp2[1]},${wp2[0]};${destination[1]},${destination[0]}`;
   127→
   128→  // Zenit uses 'car' profile to prefer main avenues/wide streets
   129→  // Standard uses 'foot' for shortest walking path
   130→  const [zenitDirectRes, footDirectRes, wp1Res, wp2Res] = await Promise.all([
   131→    fetch(`${OSRM_BASE}/car/${directCoords}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&alternatives=3`)
   132→      .then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null),
   133→    fetch(`${OSRM_BASE}/foot/${directCoords}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&alternatives=2`)
   134→      .then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null),
   135→    fetch(`${OSRM_BASE}/car/${wpCoords1}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&continue_straight=true`)
   136→      .then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null),
   137→    fetch(`${OSRM_BASE}/car/${wpCoords2}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&continue_straight=true`)
   138→      .then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null),
   139→  ]);
   140→
   141→  // Collect car-profile routes for Zenit (main avenues)
   142→  const zenitCandidates: RouteResult[] = [];
   143→  if (zenitDirectRes?.code === 'Ok' && zenitDirectRes.routes?.length) {
   144→    for (const route of zenitDirectRes.routes) zenitCandidates.push(parseOSRMRoute(route));
   145→  }
   146→  if (wp1Res?.code === 'Ok' && wp1Res.routes?.length) {
   147→    zenitCandidates.push(parseOSRMRoute(wp1Res.routes[0]));
   148→  }
   149→  if (wp2Res?.code === 'Ok' && wp2Res.routes?.length) {
   150→    zenitCandidates.push(parseOSRMRoute(wp2Res.routes[0]));
   151→  }
   152→
   153→  // Collect foot-profile routes for Standard (fastest walking)
   154→  const footCandidates: RouteResult[] = [];
   155→  if (footDirectRes?.code === 'Ok' && footDirectRes.routes?.length) {
   156→    for (const route of footDirectRes.routes) footCandidates.push(parseOSRMRoute(route));
   157→  }
   158→
   159→  // Filter out backtracking routes
   160→  const cleanZenit = zenitCandidates.filter(r => !hasBacktracking(r.coordinates));
   161→  const cleanFoot = footCandidates.filter(r => !hasBacktracking(r.coordinates));
   162→
   163→  console.log('Zenit candidates (car profile):', cleanZenit.map(r => ({
   164→    distance: Math.round(r.distance) + 'm',
   165→    turnsPerKm: Math.round(turnsPerKm(r)) + '°/km',
   166→  })));
   167→  console.log('Standard candidates (foot profile):', cleanFoot.map(r => ({
   168→    distance: Math.round(r.distance) + 'm',
   169→  })));
   170→
   171→  // Zenit = straightest car-profile route (fewest turns = main avenues)
   172→  let safe: RouteResult | null = null;
   173→  if (cleanZenit.length > 0) {
   174→    const sorted = [...cleanZenit].sort((a, b) => turnsPerKm(a) - turnsPerKm(b));
   175→    safe = sorted[0];
   176→  }
   177→
   178→  // Standard = shortest foot route (most direct walking path)
   179→  let fast: RouteResult | null = null;
   180→  if (cleanFoot.length > 0) {
   181→    const sorted = [...cleanFoot].sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance);
   182→    fast = sorted[0];
   183→  }
   184→
   185→  // Fallbacks
   186→  if (!safe && fast) safe = { ...fast, duration: fast.duration * 1.15 };
   187→  if (!fast && safe) fast = { ...safe, duration: safe.duration * 0.85 };
   188→
   189→  // Ensure Zenit always shows slightly longer time (safer but slower)
   190→  if (safe && fast && safe.duration <= fast.duration) {
   191→    safe = { ...safe, duration: fast.duration * 1.15 };
   192→  }
   193→
   194→  console.log('Selected:', {
   195→    zenit: safe ? Math.round(safe.distance) + 'm, ' + Math.round(safe.duration) + 's' : 'none',
   196→    standard: fast ? Math.round(fast.distance) + 'm, ' + Math.round(fast.duration) + 's' : 'none',
   197→  });
   198→
   199→  return { safe, fast };
   200→}
   201→
   202→/** Store the selected route in sessionStorage for cross-page use */
   203→export function storeSelectedRoute(route: RouteResult) {
   204→  sessionStorage.setItem('zenit_selected_route', JSON.stringify(route));
   205→}
   206→
   207→/** Retrieve the selected route from sessionStorage */
   208→export function getStoredRoute(): RouteResult | null {
   209→  const data = sessionStorage.getItem('zenit_selected_route');
   210→  return data ? JSON.parse(data) : null;
   211→}
   212→
```

```text
     1→import { FC, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import L from 'leaflet';
     3→import 'leaflet/dist/leaflet.css';
     4→import {
     5→  MAP_TILE_FILTER,
     6→  MAP_BACKGROUND,
     7→  MAP_ROUTE_SAFE_COLOR,
     8→  MAP_ROUTE_FAST_COLOR,
     9→  MAP_MARKER_ORIGIN_COLOR,
    10→  MAP_MARKER_FRIEND_COLOR,
    11→} from '@/config/theme';
    12→
    13→// Dark map style tiles (CartoDB Dark Matter)
    14→const DARK_TILE_URL = 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_nolabels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png';
    15→const LABELS_TILE_URL = 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_only_labels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png';
    16→
    17→const MAP_CSS = `

    20→
    21→interface FriendRoute {
    22→  name: string;
    23→  coordinates: [number, number][];
    24→  position: [number, number];
    25→}
    26→
    27→interface ZenitMapProps {
    28→  center?: [number, number];
    29→  zoom?: number;
    30→  origin?: [number, number];
    31→  destination?: [number, number];
    32→  route?: [number, number][];
    33→  alternativeRoute?: [number, number][];
    34→  selectedRoute?: 'safe' | 'fast';
    35→  friendLocations?: [number, number][];
    36→  friendRoutes?: FriendRoute[];
    37→  showUserArrow?: boolean;
    38→  userPosition?: [number, number];
    39→  fitToRoute?: boolean;
    40→  focusBounds?: [number, number][];
    41→  className?: string;
    42→}
    43→
    44→export const ZenitMap: FC<ZenitMapProps> = ({
    45→  center = [41.4036, 2.1744],
    46→  zoom = 15,
    47→  origin,
    48→  destination,
    49→  route,
    50→  alternativeRoute,
    51→  selectedRoute = 'safe',
    52→  friendLocations = [],
    53→  friendRoutes = [],
    54→  showUserArrow = false,
    55→  userPosition,
    56→  fitToRoute = false,
    57→  focusBounds,
    58→  className = '',
    59→}) => {
    60→  const mapRef = useRef<L.Map | null>(null);
    61→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    62→  const markersRef = useRef<L.Marker[]>([]);
    63→  const polylinesRef = useRef<L.Polyline[]>([]);
    64→  const prevFitToRouteRef = useRef(false);
    65→
    66→  // Initialize map
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    if (!containerRef.current || mapRef.current) return;
    69→
    70→    mapRef.current = L.map(containerRef.current, {
    71→      center: center,
    72→      zoom: zoom,
    73→      zoomControl: false,
    74→      attributionControl: false,
    75→    });
    76→
    77→    L.tileLayer(DARK_TILE_URL, { opacity: 1 }).addTo(mapRef.current);
    78→    L.tileLayer(LABELS_TILE_URL, { opacity: 0.7 }).addTo(mapRef.current);
    79→
    80→    return () => {
    81→      if (mapRef.current) {
    82→        mapRef.current.remove();
    83→        mapRef.current = null;
    84→      }
    85→    };
    86→  }, []);
    87→
    88→  // Update view: fit to route bounds when fitToRoute is active and routes change
    89→  useEffect(() => {
    90→    if (!mapRef.current || focusBounds) return;
    91→
    92→    if (fitToRoute && route && route.length > 1) {
    93→      const bounds = L.latLngBounds(route);
    94→      if (alternativeRoute && alternativeRoute.length > 1) {
    95→        alternativeRoute.forEach(pt => bounds.extend(pt));
    96→      }
    97→      if (origin) bounds.extend(origin);
    98→      if (destination) bounds.extend(destination);
    99→      mapRef.current.fitBounds(bounds, { paddingTopLeft: [40, 60], paddingBottomRight: [40, 450], maxZoom: 15, animate: true });
   100→    } else if (!fitToRoute) {
   101→      mapRef.current.setView(center, zoom);
   102→    }

   104→
   105→  // Focus on specific bounds (e.g. friend's route)

   109→    mapRef.current.fitBounds(bounds, { paddingTopLeft: [40, 60], paddingBottomRight: [40, 350], maxZoom: 16, animate: true });
   110→  }, [focusBounds]);
   111→
   112→  // Update markers and routes
   113→  useEffect(() => {

   139→        }).addTo(mapRef.current!);

   159→        }).addTo(mapRef.current!);

   216→          color: '#a78bfa',
   217→          weight: 4,
   218→          dashArray: '6, 6',
   219→          opacity: 0.7,
   220→        }).addTo(mapRef.current!);
   221→        polylinesRef.current.push(friendPolyline);
   222→      }
   223→    });
   224→
   225→    // Friend position markers (purple dot at current position)
   226→    friendRoutes.forEach(fr => {
   227→      const combinedIcon = L.divIcon({
   228→        className: 'zenit-marker',
   229→        html: `<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
   230→          <span style="
   231→            background: rgba(167,139,250,0.85);
   232→            color: white;
   233→            font-size: 11px;
   234→            font-weight: 600;
   235→            padding: 2px 8px;
   236→            border-radius: 10px;
   237→            white-space: nowrap;
   238→            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
   239→            margin-bottom: 4px;
   240→          ">${fr.name}</span>
   241→          <div style="
   242→            width: 14px;
   243→            height: 14px;
   244→            background: #a78bfa;
   245→            border-radius: 50%;
   246→            box-shadow: 0 0 10px 3px rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.5);
   247→          "></div>
   248→        </div>`,
   249→        iconSize: [60, 36],
   250→        iconAnchor: [30, 36],
   251→      });
   252→      const marker = L.marker(fr.position, { icon: combinedIcon }).addTo(mapRef.current!);
   253→      markersRef.current.push(marker);
   254→    });
   255→
   256→    // Additional friend location markers (without labels)
   257→    friendLocations.forEach(loc => {
   258→      // Skip if already covered by a friendRoute
   259→      if (friendRoutes.some(fr => fr.position[0] === loc[0] && fr.position[1] === loc[1])) return;
   260→      const friendIcon = L.divIcon({
   261→        className: 'zenit-marker',
   262→        html: `<div style="
   263→          width: 14px;
   264→          height: 14px;
   265→          background: #a78bfa;
   266→          border-radius: 50%;
   267→          box-shadow: 0 0 10px 3px rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.5);
   268→        "></div>`,
   269→        iconSize: [14, 14],
   270→        iconAnchor: [7, 7],
   271→      });
   272→      const marker = L.marker(loc, { icon: friendIcon }).addTo(mapRef.current!);
   273→      markersRef.current.push(marker);
   274→      markersRef.current.push(marker);
   275→    });
   276→
   277→    // User navigation arrow
   278→    if (showUserArrow && userPosition) {
   279→      const arrowIcon = L.divIcon({
   280→        className: 'zenit-marker',
   281→        html: `<svg width="40" height="48" viewBox="0 0 40 48" fill="none" style="filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(255, 204, 0, 0.5));">
   282→          <path d="M20 0L40 48L20 36L0 48L20 0Z" fill="#FFCC00"/>
   283→        </svg>`,
   284→        iconSize: [40, 48],
   285→        iconAnchor: [20, 24],
   286→      });
   287→      const marker = L.marker(userPosition, { icon: arrowIcon }).addTo(mapRef.current);
   288→      markersRef.current.push(marker);
   289→    }
   290→  }, [origin, destination, route, alternativeRoute, selectedRoute, friendLocations, friendRoutes, showUserArrow, userPosition]);
   291→
   292→  return (
   293→    <div className={`relative w-full h-full ${className}`}>
   294→      <style>{`
   295→        .zenit-marker {
   296→          background: transparent !important;
   297→          border: none !important;
   298→        }
   299→        ${MAP_CSS}
   300→      `}</style>
   301→      <div 
   302→        ref={containerRef} 
   303→        className="w-full h-full"
   304→        style={{ background: `hsl(${MAP_BACKGROUND})` }}
   305→      />
   306→    </div>
   307→  );
   308→};
   309→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    42→            >

    44→              Dejar de seguir
    45→            </button>
    46→          )}
    47→          {onToggleTracking && !tracking && (

    49→              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onToggleTracking(); }}

    51→            >
```

```text
     1→import { FC, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     2→import { X, Search, Check } from 'lucide-react';
     3→
     4→interface Contact {
     5→  id: string;
     6→  name: string;
     7→  avatar?: string;
     8→}
     9→
    10→interface ShareRouteModalProps {
    11→  isOpen: boolean;
    12→  onClose: () => void;
    13→  onShare: (selectedContacts: string[]) => void;
    14→  contacts: Contact[];
    15→  initialSelected?: string[];
    16→}
    17→
    18→export const ShareRouteModal: FC<ShareRouteModalProps> = ({
    19→  isOpen,
    20→  onClose,
    21→  onShare,
    22→  contacts,
    23→  initialSelected = [],
    24→}) => {
    25→  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<string[]>(initialSelected);
    26→  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
    27→
    28→  // Sync with external state only when modal opens
    29→  useEffect(() => {
    30→    if (isOpen) {
    31→      setSelected(initialSelected);
    32→    }
    33→  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
    34→  }, [isOpen]);
    35→
    36→  if (!isOpen) return null;
    37→
    38→  const filteredContacts = contacts.filter(c => 
    39→    c.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
    40→  );
    41→
    42→  const toggleContact = (id: string) => {
    43→    setSelected(prev => 
    44→      prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(x => x !== id) : [...prev, id]
    45→    );
    46→  };
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[2000] flex items-end justify-center">
    50→      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={onClose} />
    51→      <div className="relative w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-t-3xl p-6 animate-slide-up">
    52→        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
    53→          <button 
    54→            onClick={onClose}
    55→            className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary/60 flex items-center justify-center"
    56→          >
    57→            <X className="w-5 h-5 text-foreground" />
    58→          </button>
    59→          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground">Compartir tu ruta</h2>
    60→        </div>
    61→        
    62→        <p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm mb-4">
    63→          Selecciona las personas que podrán acompañar tu ruta hasta que llegues a tu destino.
    64→        </p>
    65→        
    66→        <div className="relative mb-4">
    67→          <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
    68→          <input
    69→            type="text"
    70→            placeholder="Buscar"
    71→            value={search}
    72→            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
    73→            className="zenit-input pl-12"
    74→          />
    75→        </div>
    76→        
    77→        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground mb-3">Recientes</p>
    78→        
    79→        <div className="space-y-2 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto mb-6">
    80→          {filteredContacts.map(contact => (
    81→            <button
    82→              key={contact.id}
    83→              onClick={() => toggleContact(contact.id)}
    84→              className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-secondary/30 transition-colors"
    85→            >
    86→              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-secondary flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
    87→                {contact.avatar ? (
    88→                  <img src={contact.avatar} alt={contact.name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
    89→                ) : (
    90→                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">{contact.name[0]}</span>
    91→                )}
    92→              </div>
    93→              <span className="flex-1 text-left font-medium text-foreground">{contact.name}</span>
    94→              <div className={`w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${
    95→                selected.includes(contact.id) 
    96→                  ? 'bg-primary border-primary' 
    97→                  : 'border-muted-foreground/50'
    98→              }`}>
    99→                {selected.includes(contact.id) && (
   100→                  <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-white" />
   101→                )}
   102→              </div>
   103→            </button>
   104→          ))}
   105→        </div>
   106→        
   107→        <button
   108→          onClick={() => onShare(selected)}
   109→          disabled={selected.length === 0}
   110→          className="zenit-btn-primary disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
   111→        >
   112→          Compartir
   113→        </button>
   114→        
   115→        <button onClick={onClose} className="zenit-btn-secondary mt-3">
   116→          Cancelar
   117→        </button>
   118→      </div>
   119→    </div>
   120→  );
   121→};
   122→
```

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the app. Let me compile the complete feature list.

## Comprehensive Feature List - Zenit Nighttime Companion App

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's a complete inventory of all implemented features in the Zenit app prototype:

---

### PAGES & NAVIGATION STRUCTURE (6 Main Routes)

1. **Home/Map Idle Page** (`/`)
   - Interactive dark map centered on user location
   - Real-time friend activity tracking
   - Friend request management system
   - Toggle friend visibility on map
   - Locate me button for geolocation
   - Floating action buttons for friends and location

2. **Search Page** (`/search`)
   - Dual-input location search (origin + destination)
   - Swap origin/destination functionality
   - Autocomplete suggestions with distance calculation
   - Integration with OpenStreetMap Nominatim API
   - Persistent location history via sessionStorage

3. **Route Selection Page** (`/routes`)
   - Dual route comparison (Ruta Zenit vs Ruta Estándar)
   - Real-time route calculation using OSRM API
   - Route cards showing distance, duration, safety percentage
   - Collapsible bottom sheet for route selection
   - Drag-to-collapse gesture support on mobile
   - Route characteristics display (lighting, safety, crowds)

4. **Route Details Page** (`/route-details`)
   - Route preview on interactive map
   - Share route with contacts modal
   - Viewers list showing who's tracking the route
   - Remove viewers functionality
   - Start navigation button

5. **Active Navigation Page** (`/navigation`)
   - Real-time user position tracking on map
   - Friend activity cards showing live friend positions
   - Direction instruction card with turn icons
   - Animated user arrow showing bearing
   - Friends activity panel with collapsible sheet
   - Friend activity focus view
   - Share route modal during navigation
   - Route cancellation with confirmation dialog
   - Shared contacts list with ability to remove viewers
   - Navigation end button

6. **Navigation Complete Page** (`/navigation-end`)
   - Success celebration screen with checkmark animation
   - Confirmation message
   - Return to home button

---

### CORE FEATURES & FUNCTIONALITY

#### Route Calculation & Smart Routing

- **Dual Route Algorithm** using OSRM (Open Source Routing Machine)
  - Ruta Zenit (Safe): Uses car profile, prioritizes main avenues/wide streets, straightest routes with fewer turns
  - Ruta Estándar (Fast): Uses foot profile, shortest walking distance
  
- **Route Differentiation Strategy**:
  - OSRM alternatives (up to 3 routes)
  - Small nudge waypoints (~200-300m offset) for variety
  - Backtracking/loop detection and filtering
  - Route distance validation (max 1.6x shortest)
  - Turn angle calculation (degrees per km) for safety assessment
  
- **Distance & Duration Calculation**:
  - Real walking speed simulation (1.4 m/s = ~5 km/h)
  - Duration adjustment for safety routes (slightly longer)
  - Haversine distance formula for coordinate calculations

#### Geolocation & Location Services

- **User Geolocation**:
  - Browser geolocation API integration with high accuracy
  - Persistent user location across pages
  - Manual location refresh via "locate me" button
  
- **Place Search** (Nominatim API):
  - Search within Barcelona area bounds
  - Distance calculation from user to search results
  - Debounced search input (300ms)
  - Spanish language support

#### Map Interface

- **Interactive Map** (Leaflet-based):
  - Dark CartoDB tiles with custom styling
  - Origin marker (yellow circle with glow)
  - Destination marker (yellow with inner dot)
  - Route visualization (yellow for Zenit, purple for Standard)
  - Route selection highlighting (solid vs dashed)
  - Fit-to-bounds functionality for route overview
  - Friend routes displayed as purple dashed lines
  - Friend location markers with names
  - User navigation arrow showing bearing direction
  - Bounds focusing on friend routes
  - Custom tile filter (sepia, hue-rotate, saturation, brightness)

#### Friend & Social Features

- **Friend Request System**:
  - Incoming friend request modal
  - Queue-based request handling (2.5s delay between requests)
  - Accept/Reject functionality
  - Pending requests list management
  - Session-based storage of friend states

- **Friend Tracking**:
  - Live friend activity cards showing:
    - Friend name and current location
    - Activity status (e.g., "está caminando")
    - Destination and address
    - Last update time
    - Departure and estimated arrival times
    - Travel progress percentage
  - Toggle friend visibility on map
  - Stop tracking confirmation dialog
  - Hidden friends remain in state but invisible on map

- **Route Sharing**:
  - Share route with multiple contacts
  - Contact search/filter in share modal
  - Multi-select contact picker
  - View count badge showing active viewers
  - Viewers list modal with ability to remove individual viewers
  - Confirmation dialog before removing viewers
  - Real-time viewer list during navigation

- **Friend Data**:
  - Sample hardcoded friends (Juan, Marta) with:
    - Real routes fetched from OSRM
    - Animated position progress
    - Fallback routes if API fails
    - Custom origin/destination coordinates

#### Real-time Simulation Features

- **User Movement Simulation** (during navigation):
  - Automatic user position advancement along route every 3 seconds
  - Route index progression
  - Continuous navigation experience

- **Friend Movement Simulation**:
  - Automatic friend position advancement every 2 seconds
  - Route progression along fetched routes
  - Position updates on map

#### Data Persistence

- **SessionStorage Management**:
  - Selected route storage (`zenit_selected_route`)
  - Origin/destination storage (`zenit_origin`, `zenit_destination`)
  - Accepted friends list (`zenit_accepted_friends`)
  - Pending requests (`zenit_pending_requests`)
  - Hidden friends (`zenit_hidden_friends`)
  - Shared contacts during navigation (`zenit_shared_contacts`)
  - Selected route type (`zenit_selected_route_type`)

#### Navigation UI Components

- **Direction Cards**: Shows turn direction (left/right/straight) with distance and instruction
- **Route Cards**: Displays route type, distance, duration, safety percentage, and characteristics
- **Friend Activity Cards**: Shows friend status, activity, destination, departure/arrival times
- **Search Suggestions**: Place search results with icons, addresses, and distances
- **Pending Requests List**: Compact list of pending friend location requests
- **Share Route Modal**: Contact selection modal with search filter and multi-select
- **Friend Request Modal**: Full-screen modal for incoming location sharing requests
- **Location Input**: Dual-field location picker with swap functionality
- **Bottom Sheets**: Collapsible panels with drag-to-collapse gesture support

#### Theme & Styling

- **Dark Theme**:
  - Deep purple background (#1F193D)
  - Light text on dark surfaces
  - Color scheme: purples, yellows, and muted tones
  
- **Color Palette**:
  - Primary: Purple (265° 90% 60%)
  - Accent: Yellow/Gold (45° 100% 50%)
  - Secondary: Dark purple variants
  - Destructive: Red for warning/delete actions
  - All colors defined in centralized theme config

- **Typography**:
  - Inter font family across app
  - Semantic hierarchy with font weights

#### UI/UX Elements

- **FABs** (Floating Action Buttons):
  - Friends toggle button with notification badge
  - Locate me button
  - Navigation mode toggle (fit-all vs focus)
  
- **Buttons**:
  - Primary: Full-width actions (continue, start navigation)
  - Secondary: Alternative actions (cancel, back)
  - Icon buttons: Compact action triggers
  - Confirmation buttons for destructive actions

- **Modals & Dialogs**:
  - Full-screen friend request modal
  - Bottom-sheet share route modal with animation
  - Inline confirmation dialogs
  - Overlay modals for route cancellation
  - Viewers list popovers

- **Responsive Design**:
  - Mobile-first approach
  - Max-width constrained to mobile (max-w-md)
  - Bottom sheets adapt to content height
  - Touch-optimized interaction areas

- **Animations**:
  - Fade-in/zoom-in transitions for modals
  - Slide-up animation for bottom sheets
  - Smooth drag gestures on mobile
  - Scale transforms on button clicks
  - Transition effects on color/state changes

---

### TECHNICAL INTEGRATIONS

1. **External APIs**:
   - OpenStreetMap Nominatim (place search)
   - OSRM - Open Source Routing Machine (routing)
   - CartoDB (dark map tiles)

2. **Libraries & Frameworks**:
   - React 18 with TypeScript
   - React Router v6 (navigation)
   - Leaflet (mapping)
   - React Hook Form (forms)
   - TanStack React Query (data fetching)
   - Tailwind CSS (styling)
   - Lucide React (icons)
   - Radix UI (accessible components)
   - Zod (schema validation)
   - Recharts (charting, though not actively used in visible features)

3. **Browser APIs**:
   - Geolocation API (GPS positioning)
   - SessionStorage (data persistence)
   - Touch Events (gesture handling)

---

### CONFIGURATION & CONSTANTS

- **Contacts Configuration**: Hardcoded contact list (Juan, María, Carla, Javier)
- **Theme Configuration**: All colors, fonts, gradients, shadows defined in `theme.ts`
- **Barcelona Bounds**: Search restricted to Barcelona area (viewbox: 2.0524,41.4620,2.2280,41.3200)
- **Default Locations**: Fallback coordinates for Barcelona city center

---

### INCOMPLETE/NOT FULLY IMPLEMENTED

- Authentication/Login system (not visible in routes)
- User profile management (beyond friend sharing)
- Settings page
- Notification system (modals only, no push notifications)
- Supabase integration (imported but not utilized)
- Data charts/analytics (Recharts installed but unused)
- Actual backend persistence (all data in sessionStorage only)

---

This is a fully-featured prototype focusing on route safety, friend tracking, and real-time navigation sharing for nighttime travel in Barcelona.
